summary: App Store Compliance Audit - All tests PASS. Backend Apple IAP validation correctly rejects missing fields (400) and unknown product IDs. SubscriptionPaywall has Apple-mandated auto-renewal disclosure and Privacy/Terms links. iOS PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy includes DiskSpace API declaration. LaunchScreen uses dark theme (#0F1629).

subscription_plans_endpoint.description: Returns 8 benefactor plans and 7 beneficiary plans correctly

subscription_status_endpoint.description: Returns valid subscription status for authenticated user

apple_receipt_missing_fields.description: Returns 400 with 'Missing transaction_id or product_id' for empty payload

apple_receipt_unknown_product.description: Returns 400 with 'Unknown product: ...' for invalid product IDs

dashboard_loads.description: Dashboard loads with Estate Readiness Score and sidebar navigation

settings_page_loads.description: Settings page loads with Profile, Push Notifications, Subscription sections

account_deletion_option.description: GDPR Article 17 compliant deletion with data-testid='gdpr-delete-account'

subscription_paywall_privacy_terms.description: Terms of Service (data-testid='paywall-terms-link') and Privacy Policy (data-testid='paywall-privacy-link') links present

subscription_paywall_auto_renewal.description: Apple-mandated disclosure: 'Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period'

ios_privacy_manifest.description: Includes NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryDiskSpace (E174.1), FileTimestamp (C617.1), UserDefaults (CA92.1), and analytics data types

ios_launch_screen.description: Dark background RGB(0.059, 0.086, 0.161) = #0F1629 matches app theme

critical_code_review_comments: Apple IAP validation properly implements server-side receipt verification with Apple's verifyReceipt endpoint
Transaction replay protection via unique index on apple_transactions.transaction_id
Auto-renewal disclosure meets Apple Guideline 3.1.2 requirements
Privacy manifest covers all required API categories for App Store compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Store compliance audit completed. All Apple IAP validation, privacy manifest, launch screen, and subscription disclosure features verified. Backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_appstore_compliance.py cover all Apple receipt validation edge cases. Demo account info@carryon.us credentials did not work - use fulltest@test.com instead.
